prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large brown metal sphere
  - obj_1: small green metal cylinder
  - obj_2: large green rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small blue metal cylinder
  - obj_4: large green metal cube
  - obj_5: small purple metal cube
  - obj_6: large green metal sphere
  - obj_7: large blue metal sphere
  - obj_8: large red metal cylinder
  - obj_9: large yellow metal cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0281] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0282] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0283] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0284] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0285] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0286] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0287] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0288] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0289] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0290] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0291] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0292] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0293] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0294] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0295] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0296] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0297] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0298] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0299] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0300] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the scene and answer distance comparison questions.

Let me identify the approximate positions of each object:
- obj_0 (large brown metal sphere): right side, back area
- obj_1 (small green metal cylinder): right-center area
- obj_2 (large green rubber cylinder): center-back area
- obj_3 (small blue metal cylinder): left-center area
- obj_4 (large green metal cube): far back area
- obj_5 (small purple metal cube): front-center area
- obj_6 (large green metal sphere): right-back area
- obj_7 (large blue metal sphere): front area
- obj_8 (large red metal cylinder): left area
- obj_9 (large yellow metal cylinder): right-front area

Let me estimate coordinates (x, y, z) roughly:
- obj_0 (brown sphere): (6, 0, 1)
- obj_1 (small green cylinder): (4, 0, 0)
- obj_2 (green rubber cylinder): (2, 0, 2)
- obj_3 (blue cylinder): (1, 0, 0)
- obj_4 (green metal cube): (0, 0, 4)
- obj_5 (purple cube): (3, 0, -2)
- obj_6 (green metal sphere): (4, 0, 3)
- obj_7 (blue sphere): (3, 0, -3)
- obj_8 (red cylinder): (-1, 0, 0)
- obj_9 (yellow cylinder): (5, 0, -2)

Now let me calculate distances for each question:

obj_1 to obj_4: sqrt((4-0)²+(0-4)²) = sqrt(32) ≈ 5.7

[qrr_0281] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_2-obj_3: obj_2-obj_3: sqrt((2-1)²+(2-0)²)=sqrt(5)≈2.2. 5.7 > 2.2 → ">"
[qrr_0282] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_2-obj_5: obj_2-obj_5: sqrt((2-3)²+(2-(-2))²)=sqrt(1+16)=sqrt(17)≈4.1. 5.7 > 4.1 → ">"
[qrr_0283] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_2-obj_6: obj_2-obj_6: sqrt((2-4)²+(2-3)²)=sqrt(5)≈2.2. 5.7 > 2.2 → ">"
[qrr_0284] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_2-obj_7: obj_2-obj_7: sqrt((2-3)²+(2-(-3))²)=sqrt(1+25)=sqrt(26)≈5.1. 5.7 > 5.1 → ">"
[qrr_0285] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_2-obj_8: obj_2-obj_8: sqrt((2-(-1))²+(2-0)²)=sqrt(9+4)=sqrt(13)≈3.6. 5.7 > 3.6 → ">"
[qrr_0286] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_3-obj_5: obj_3-obj_5: sqrt((1-3)²+(0-(-2))²)=sqrt(4+4)=sqrt(8)≈2.8. 5.7 > 2.8 → ">"
[qrr_0287] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_3-obj_7: obj_3-obj_7: sqrt((1-3)²+(0-(-3))²)=sqrt(4+9)=sqrt(13)≈3.6. 5.7 > 3.6 → ">"
[qrr_0288] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_3-obj_8: obj_3-obj_8: sqrt((1-(-1))²)=2. 5.7 > 2 → ">"
[qrr_0289] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_3-obj_9: obj_3-obj_9: sqrt((1-5)²+(0-(-2))²)=sqrt(16+4)=sqrt(20)≈4.5. 5.7 > 4.5 → ">"
[qrr_0290] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_5-obj_6: obj_5-obj_6: sqrt((3-4)²+((-2)-3)²)=sqrt(1+25)=sqrt(26)≈5.1. 5.7 > 5.1 → ">"
[qrr_0291] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_5-obj_7: obj_5-obj_7: sqrt((3-3)²+((-2)-(-3))²)=1. 5.7 > 1 → ">"
[qrr_0292] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_5-obj_8: obj_5-obj_8: sqrt((3-(-1))²+((-2)-0)²)=sqrt(16+4)≈4.5. 5.7 > 4.5 → ">"
[qrr_0293] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_5-obj_9: obj_5-obj_9: sqrt((3-5)²+((-2)-(-2))²)=2. 5.7 > 2 → ">"
[qrr_0294] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_6-obj_7: obj_6-obj_7: sqrt((4-3)²+(3-(-3))²)=sqrt(1+36)=sqrt(37)≈6.1. 5.7 < 6.1 → "<"
[qrr_0295] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_6-obj_8: obj_6-obj_8: sqrt((4-(-1))²+(3-0)²)=sqrt(25+9)=sqrt(34)≈5.8. 5.7 ~= 5.8 → "~="
[qrr_0296] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_7-obj_9: obj_7-obj_9: sqrt((3-5)²+((-3)-(-2))²)=sqrt(4+1)=sqrt(5)≈2.2. 5.7 > 2.2 → ">"
[qrr_0297] obj_1-obj_4 vs obj_8-obj_9: obj_8-obj_9: sqrt(((-1)-5)²+(0-(-2))²)=sqrt(36+4)=sqrt(40)≈6.3. 5.7 < 6.3 → "<"
[qrr_0298] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_2-obj_3: obj_1-obj_5: sqrt((4-3)²+(0-(-2))²)=sqrt(1+4)=sqrt(5)≈2.2. obj_2-obj_3≈2.2. → "~="
[qrr_0299] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_2-obj_4: obj_2-obj_4: sqrt((2-0)²+(2-4)²)=sqrt(4+4)=sqrt(8)≈2.8. 2.2 < 2.8 → "<"
[qrr_0300] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_2-obj_6: obj_2-obj_6≈2.2. → "~="
